records.ety: [A different spelling and application of bought bend.]

defs: As much of an action as is performed at one time; a going and returning, as of workmen in reaping, mowing, etc.; a turn; a round.
quotes: In notes with many a winding bout Of linked sweetness long drawn out.
The prince . . . has taken me in his train, so that I am in no danger of starving for this bout.

defs: A conflict; contest; attempt; trial; a set-to at anything; as, a fencing bout; a drinking bout.
quotes: The gentleman will, for his honor's sake, have one bout with you; he can not by the duello avoid it.
